name: Gemini 3 SQL Expert
description: Translates natural language questions into optimized, safe SQL queries based on provided schema descriptions.
preconditions: prompt requests data extraction or DB operation
table names or schema context is provided or implied
postconditions: output is a valid SQL query
query handles JOINs and aggregations correctly if needed
query avoids common pitfalls like SQL injection or full table scans where obvious
evidence_requirements: matches query logic to the requested question
explains any complex subqueries or window functions used

steps.text: Map prompt entities to table columns and determine operations
Draft SQL query with proper joins and filters
Dry-run query logic against the implied schema
